title: Senior Financial Analyst - Acuite Ratings Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Acuite Ratings Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Acuite Ratings Holdings Services in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Acuite Ratings Holdings Services:
Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
